response.justification: Bogdan is a high-potential but high-risk candidate. His primary strength is a rare and highly relevant combination of deep geospatial domain experience (founding GISCollective) and systems programming expertise demonstrated through extensive work with Dlang on low-latency systems. However, his professional C++ experience is very dated (2015), and he does not list C++ or Rust as current skills, which is a major deviation from the core requirements. An interview is recommended to probe his systems-level knowledge and assess his ability and willingness to quickly ramp up on modern C++.
strengths: Extensive, hands-on geospatial data experience as founder of GISCollective and work with Green Map.
Proven experience building low-latency, high-performance systems with Dlang, a C-family language.
Demonstrates a strong 'software craftsman' mindset and willingness to work across a wide technical stack.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust, the primary required languages.
Most recent roles have been focused on full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js).
Geospatial experience is in data collection/mapping platforms, not specifically in routing or tiling optimization.
